arts.ttl: Lyon predicted XI v Brest: Maxence Caqueret absent as he nears move
arts.sum: Maxence Caqueret will not be involved as Olympique Lyonnais travel to face Stade Brestois this evening. The academy product is nearing a move to Serie A side Como and will…

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Donyell Malen to Aston Villa, Nemanja Matic to Ipswich
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Donyell Malen to Aston Villa, Nemanja Matic to Ipswich Town and Kevin Schade to Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Como Boss Delivers Huge Transfer Update on Lyon Veteran
arts.sum: Como manager Cesc Fabregas addressed the media after last night's dramatic 1-1 draw against Lazio at the Stadio Olimpico. During his post-match chat with DAZN via TMW, Fabregas discussed several topics, including Nico Paz's injury. The post Como Boss Delivers Huge Transfer Update on Lyon Veteran appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Como agree Caqueret transfer with Olympique Lyonnais

arts.ttl: French FA upholds sanctions on Olympique Lyonnais in appeal hearing
arts.sum: According to a report by L’Équipe, the French FA’s appeals committee has decided to uphold sanctions imposed on Olympique Lyonnais given to the club in November. This includes the transfer…

arts.ttl: Brest to keep Champions League games at Roudourou stadium despite high fan demand
arts.sum: Brest, the surprise package of the revamped Champions League, won’t be moving its home games in Europe’s premier club competition to the Stade de France, despite huge demand from its fans. With two matches left to play in the group phase of the tournament — including a home game against star-studded Real Madrid on Jan. 29 — Brest is seventh in the 36-team standings.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas role crucial in Maxence Caqueret’s imminent move from Lyon to Como
arts.sum: Earlier today, L’Équipe reported that Olympique Lyonnais had reached an agreement worth €17m for the transfer of midfielder and academy graduate Maxence Caqueret (24) to Serie A side Como. We…

arts.ttl: Anderlecht working on deal to sign Brazilian defender from Lyon
arts.sum: According to L’Equipe, Anderlecht are working on a deal with Lyon to sign Brazilian defender Adryelson on loan until the end of the season. Part of the loan agreement will…

arts.ttl: Como Secure Major Coup from France: Caqueret Deal Done with Lyon
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas' Como have pulled off an unexpected transfer coup. According to L'Equipe, the Lombardy club is on the verge of securing Lyon midfielder Maxence Caqueret on a permanent deal. This development comes after earlier rumours linked Como with Caqueret's more experienced teammate Nemanja Matic. The post Como Secure Major Coup from France: Caqueret Deal Done with Lyon appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Everton to submit bid for Lyon’s Ernest Nuamah
arts.sum: Everton will reignite their interest in Lyon winger Ernest Nuamah (21) and submit a bid to their Ligue 1 counterparts, according to RMC Sport’s Fabrice Hawkins. The 21-year-old is mostly…
